title: Bedwars Essentials
description: This project makes your bedwars experience better! Just like those youtube shorts you see! Come and check it out please!!!
body:
This is a pretty simple resource pack. Ever seen any of those youtube shorts with bedwars gameplay? Love them textures? Well now you can do that with GOD156's very own Bedwars Essential resource pack!

Also the discord is not dedicated to this resource pack. It is used for other things too. Please ping the owner and clearly state you're there for the resource pack. Report bugs and make suggestions in the discord. 😉
